title: Six Puffs: The Copper Pipe
description: A Single Item pack that adds customisable potion effect combinations!
body:
Six Puffs adds a single new item to Minecraft, the Copper Pipe.

The Copper Pipe is craftable from 4 Copper Ingots and a single Goat Horn. Combine it with up to 3 plants to fill it, then smoke to inflict the effects of your chosen combination.

Each puff produces a smoke particle and grants the  combined status effects of the plants you've crafted it with. A filled pipe holds 6 uses before it empties, then  it can be refilled again.

## Features

- The Copper Pipe is compatible with 80+ Vanilla plants and items.
- Each combination of plants gives an entirely different combination of effects!
- Refillable. Only need to craft it once!

Over 512,000 Combinations! Share your favourites with friends, as the Copper Pipe can be passed around to other players.
